title: create vehicels
description: a mod pack around valkrieny skies
body:
The Create Vehicles modpack combines the mechanical systems of the Create mod with a wide range of vehicle and transportation expansions.
It is designed for players who enjoy building automated factories, moving machines, vehicles, and complex industrial infrastructure.

Key Included Mods

Create – Core mechanics mod featuring gears, belts, rotational power, and movement systems.

Create Big Cannons, Create Tank Defenses – Adds large-scale cannons and armored vehicle components.

Create Propulsion, Create Liquid Fuel, Create Enchantment Industry, Create Tweaked Controllers – Expansions for Create that add propulsion systems, liquid fuels, enchantment automation, and improved controls.

Valkyrien Skies (VS Mod) and addons like WariumVS, VSChunkLoader, VS Addition – Enables fully physics-based, movable structures such as ships, vehicles, and aircraft.

Biomes O’ Plenty, Farmer’s Delight, Copycats, Createdeco – Enhances world generation, decoration, and farming options.

TIS-3D and CC: Tweaked – Computer and automation mods for advanced control systems.

Embeddium, Oculus, EntityCulling – Performance and graphical optimization mods.

Essential, Xaero’s Minimap, TreeHarvester, Open Parties and Claims – Quality-of-life and multiplayer tools.

Photon Shaderpack – Adds realistic lighting and visual effects.

Gameplay Experience

Create Vehicles offers a technical and mechanical sandbox experience where you can:

Build realistic vehicles, ships, and machines,

Design fully automated production lines and factories,

Experiment with physics-based movement and automation,

Explore an enhanced world filled with new biomes and improved visuals.

Summary

A modpack for engineers, builders, and creators who want to design moving machines and vehicles — focusing on creativity, physics, and complex technical systems.
